details.controllers: All controllers scope queries strictly by `tenant_id`
details.repositories: Isolated repository layers tested over `movimientos` and `productos`
details.payloadValidation: Destructured configuration endpoints in `empresa.controller.js` to mitigate direct Model Binding injection
details.tests: Integration tests passing across Products, Movements, Health, and Dashboard endpoints

details.tanStackQueries: Verified `useQuery` integrations strictly match isolated HTTP endpoints
details.stateManagement: React Context correctly segregates JWT/Tenant tokens (no global Zustand pollution)
details.forms: Migrated core dynamic forms (e.g. LoginForm) to `react-hook-form` + `zod` for payload integrity

details.rbac: Granular `checkPermiso` scopes correctly applied over routes
details.auditLogs: Immutable AuditLog trail attached via middleware to critical PUT/POST/DELETE calls on core models
details.mfa: MFA support confirmed in the authentication flow

notes: System gracefully handles connection failures (e.g. degradable Redis limits). All ports and configurations are statically sound.
